zh.lifeSummary: 當James Covey於1615年出生在英國英格蘭倫敦斯特普尼時，他的父親John William Covey32歲，母親Joan Dagwell42歲。他於1653年9月19日與Mary Cossyne在英國英格蘭米德萊可斯特普尼聖 登斯坦 安德 哥吉拉 沙智 邱奇結婚。他去世於1712年9月5日在美國羅得島華盛頓維斯特利享年97歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James Covey于1615年出生在英国英格兰倫敦斯特普尼时，他的父亲John William Covey32岁，母亲Joan Dagwell42岁。他于1653年9月19日与Mary Cossyne在英国英格兰米德萊可斯特普尼聖 登斯坦 安德 哥吉拉 沙智 邱奇结婚。他去世于1712年9月5日在美国罗德岛州華盛頓維斯特利享年97岁。

nameMeanings.name: Covey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: shortened form of MacCovey, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cobhthaigh (see Coffey ).

English: unexplained. Covey is used of ‘pantry’ in the early modern period and covey ‘little chap’ (a diminutive of cove, Middle English cof ‘bold, eager, courageous’; see Cove ) in the early nineteenth century, but there is no evidence to confirm either as the source for the surname.

variants.name: Coffey
meanings: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Cathbhadha ‘descendant of Cathbhadh’, a byname meaning ‘battle tent’, Ó Cathbhuadhaigh ‘descendant of Cathbhuadhach’ (‘battle victorious’), or Ó Cathmhogha ‘descendant of Cathmhugh’ (‘battle slave’).
shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Cobhthaigh ‘descendant of Cobhthach’, a byname meaning ‘victorious’.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When James Covey was born in 1615, in Stepney, London, England, United Kingdom, his father, John William Covey, was 32 and his mother, Joan Dagwell, was 42. He married Mary Cossyne on 19 September 1653, in Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom. He died on 5 September 1712, in Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, United States, at the age of 97.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Covey est né en 1615, à Stepney, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John William Covey, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Joan Dagwell, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Mary Cossyne le 19 septembre 1653, à Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 5 septembre 1712, à Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, États-Unis, à l’âge de 97 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als James Covey 1615 in Stepney, London, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John William Covey 32 und seine Mutter Joan Dagwell 42. Er hat am 19. September 1653 in Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom Mary Cossyne geheiratet. Er starb am 5. September 1712 im Alter von 97 Jahren in Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando James Covey è nato il nel 1615 nel Stepney, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John William Covey, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Joan Dagwell, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Mary Cossyne il 19 settembre 1653, nel Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 5 settembre 1712, nel Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 97 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: James Coveyが1615年にイギリスイギリスロンドンステプニーで生まれた時，父John William Coveyは32歳，母Joan Dagwellは42歳であった。1653年9月19日にイギリスイギリスミッドレセックスステプニーサイント ダンスタン アンド アル サインツ チャーチでMary Cossyneと結婚した。彼は1712年9月5日にアメリカ合衆国ロードアイランド州ワシュイントンウエステルリーで97歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: James Covey(이)가 1615년 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스테p니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John William Covey(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Dagwell(은)는 42세였다. 그는 1653년 9월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 스테p니 세인트 던스탠 앤드 앨 세인츠 c후르치에서 Mary Cossyne(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1712년 9월 5일 미국 로드아일랜드 주 와신그턴 웨스털리에서 97세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando James Covey nasceu em 1615, em Stepney, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John William Covey, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Joan Dagwell, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Cossyne em 19 de setembro de 1653, em Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 5 de setembro de 1712, em Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos da América, com 97 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Covey родился в 1615 г. в местности степни, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John William Covey было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Dagwell, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Cossyne 19 сентября 1653 г. в местности сеинт дунстань анд алл сеинц чурч, степни, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 5 сентября 1712 г. в местности вестирли, вашингтон, Род-Айленд, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 97 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando James Covey nació en 1615, en Stepney, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John William Covey, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Joan Dagwell, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Mary Cossyne el 19 de septiembre de 1653, en Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 5 de septiembre de 1712, en Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 97 años.
